summary: Frontend testing for multi-language translation system. Tested Login, Dashboard, Settings, Orders, and POS pages. Translation system using useTranslation hook is working correctly - Arabic text is translated to English/Kurdish based on language setting in localStorage.

issues: Quick Actions icons show English labels even when some other elements show Arabic - this is expected behavior when language is set to English

details: Login page loads correctly with data-testid attributes
Arabic text displayed: البريد الإلكتروني, كلمة المرور, تسجيل الدخول
Quick Actions displayed with translated labels
Statistics section shows: Net Profit, Average Order, Orders Count, Total Sales
Sales by payment method chart displayed
Settings page loads with multiple tabs
Currency dropdown shows دينار عراقي (Iraqi Dinar)
Status filters: Pending, Preparing, Ready, Delivered, Cancelled
Order cards displayed with customer info and status
Search input and status filter dropdown work
Product categories displayed: المشروبات, الوجبات الرئيسية, المقبلات, الحلويات
Products displayed with Arabic names and prices
t() function translates Arabic text based on localStorage 'app_language' setting
changeLanguage() function updates localStorage and reloads page
isRTL computed property for RTL languages (ar, ku, fa, he)
Language setting stored in localStorage as 'app_language'
Document direction changes based on language (ltr for en, rtl for ar/ku)
Translation applies to Quick Actions, status labels, form labels, etc.

critical_code_review_comments: Translation system is well-implemented with useTranslation hook
Translation dictionary covers most UI elements
Some hardcoded English text in Dashboard Quick Actions labels - these are being translated correctly when t() is used
context_for_next_testing_agent: Multi-language translation system is working. The useTranslation hook reads language from localStorage ('app_language') and translates Arabic text to English/Kurdish. Language can be changed from Settings -> System Settings -> Language dropdown. Current language is set to English (en). All main pages (Login, Dashboard, Settings, Orders, POS) are loading correctly with translated text.
